info.title: Pinnacle API
info.description:
Real-time **Pinnacle** betting markets over plain JSON: live events, full market depth, and the latest bindable prices. **Try it now** — enter your username and password: every code sample on this page is rewritten with your credentials, ready to copy and run, and the check button verifies them against the live API.
Don't have an account? [Contact us](https://www.pinc000.com/) to get a free trial. ## Freshness & polling Events and odds endpoints return a snapshot plus a `last` cursor — a Unix timestamp in **milliseconds** marking when the data was current. Pass it back as `?since=` on the next call to receive only what changed since then. An empty response means nothing has changed yet — that is the idle answer, not an error. ## Authentication All endpoints use **HTTP Basic** authentication. Send on every request: `Authorization: Basic ` Requests without valid credentials receive `401 Unauthorized`. ## Sports | Sport | `sport` id | |---|---| | Soccer | 29 | | Basketball | 4 | | Tennis | 33 | | Baseball | 3 | | Hockey | 19 | | Esports | 12 |

get.description:
Every event currently on offer for the sport, grouped by league.

You get each event's id, start time, teams and live status; use the event
id with `/events/{event_id}/markets` and `/events/{event_id}/price`.

The response carries `last` — a Unix timestamp in **milliseconds** marking
when this data was current. Pass it back as `?since=<last>` on the next
call to receive only what changed after that moment; an empty `league`
list is the idle answer (nothing changed), not an error. The very first
request for a sport may return few or no events for a moment while its
live data loads — poll again.

parameters.name: sport

schema.description:
Numeric sport id.

| Sport | `sport` id |
|---|---|
| Soccer | 29 |
| Basketball | 4 |
| Tennis | 33 |
| Baseball | 3 |
| Hockey | 19 |
| Esports | 12 |

parameters.description:
Numeric sport id.

| Sport | `sport` id |
|---|---|
| Soccer | 29 |
| Basketball | 4 |
| Tennis | 33 |
| Baseball | 3 |
| Hockey | 19 |
| Esports | 12 |

parameters.name: since

schema.description: Unix timestamp in **milliseconds** — the moment your data was current, i.e. the `last` value from your previous response. When set, the response contains only what changed after that moment; an empty response means nothing has changed yet (the idle answer, not an error). Omit it to receive a full snapshot.
schema.title: Since

parameters.description: Unix timestamp in **milliseconds** — the moment your data was current, i.e. the `last` value from your previous response. When set, the response contains only what changed after that moment; an empty response means nothing has changed yet (the idle answer, not an error). Omit it to receive a full snapshot.

parameters.name: isLive

schema.description: Set to 1 to return only events that are live right now.
schema.title: Islive

parameters.description: Set to 1 to return only events that are live right now.

parameters.name: eventIds

schema.description: Restrict the response to these event ids (repeat the parameter or send a comma-separated list).
schema.title: Eventids

parameters.description: Restrict the response to these event ids (repeat the parameter or send a comma-separated list).

get.description:
Live spreads, totals and moneylines for every event of the sport.

Odds are grouped league → event → period; each line carries the price and
the ids you need to quote (`/events/{event_id}/price`) or place
(`POST /bets/straight`) a bet on it. Prices are decimal by default;
`oddsFormat=American` converts.

The response carries `last` — a Unix timestamp in **milliseconds** marking
when this data was current. Pass it back as `?since=<last>` on the next
call to receive only what changed after that moment; an empty `leagues`
list is the idle answer (nothing changed), not an error. The very first
request for a sport may return few or no events for a moment while its
live data loads — poll again.

parameters.name: sport

schema.description:
Numeric sport id.

| Sport | `sport` id |
|---|---|
| Soccer | 29 |
| Basketball | 4 |
| Tennis | 33 |
| Baseball | 3 |
| Hockey | 19 |
| Esports | 12 |

parameters.description:
Numeric sport id.

| Sport | `sport` id |
|---|---|
| Soccer | 29 |
| Basketball | 4 |
| Tennis | 33 |
| Baseball | 3 |
| Hockey | 19 |
| Esports | 12 |

parameters.name: oddsFormat

schema.description: Format of the returned prices. Prices are Decimal by default; American is converted exactly, the remaining formats currently fall back to Decimal.

parameters.description: Format of the returned prices. Prices are Decimal by default; American is converted exactly, the remaining formats currently fall back to Decimal.

parameters.name: since

schema.description: Unix timestamp in **milliseconds** — the moment your data was current, i.e. the `last` value from your previous response. When set, the response contains only what changed after that moment; an empty response means nothing has changed yet (the idle answer, not an error). Omit it to receive a full snapshot.

parameters.description: Unix timestamp in **milliseconds** — the moment your data was current, i.e. the `last` value from your previous response. When set, the response contains only what changed after that moment; an empty response means nothing has changed yet (the idle answer, not an error). Omit it to receive a full snapshot.

parameters.name: isLive

schema.description: Set to 1 to return only events that are live right now.

parameters.description: Set to 1 to return only events that are live right now.

get.description:
Game state — period and elapsed clock — for the sport's live events.

Events are grouped by league under the requested sport. `state` is the
match phase (1 = 1st half, 2 = half time, 3 = 2nd half, 9 = ended);
`elapsed` is the minutes played. A sport with no live events returns an
empty `sports` list — not an error.

parameters.name: sport

schema.description:
Numeric sport id.

| Sport | `sport` id |
|---|---|
| Soccer | 29 |
| Basketball | 4 |
| Tennis | 33 |
| Baseball | 3 |
| Hockey | 19 |
| Esports | 12 |

parameters.description:
Numeric sport id.

| Sport | `sport` id |
|---|---|
| Soccer | 29 |
| Basketball | 4 |
| Tennis | 33 |
| Baseball | 3 |
| Hockey | 19 |
| Esports | 12 |

get.description:
The current balance of your betting account.

`availableBalance` is the amount you can stake right now, in
`currency` units; `outstandingTransactions` and `givenCredit` are included
when available. Returns `503` if the balance cannot be fetched at this
moment — retry shortly.

post.description:
Place a single straight bet.

Send the market coordinates of one selection (`eventId`, `periodNumber`,
`betType` plus `team`/`side`/`handicap`), the `lineId` (and `altLineId` for
an alternate line) from `/sports/{sport}/odds`, and your `stake`. The
selection is re-priced at the freshest bindable price before placement; a
stale or closed line returns `PROCESSED_WITH_ERROR` without any wager. On
success `status` is `ACCEPTED` and `betId` identifies the wager.

**This endpoint spends real money.** Pass `?dryRun=true` to exercise the
full validate-and-price path and see exactly what would be placed without
submitting the wager — the recommended first call for any integration.

parameters.name: dryRun

schema.description: When true, run the full validate-and-price path and return what would be placed WITHOUT submitting the wager. Defaults to false: a real bet is placed and your account is debited.
schema.title: Dryrun

parameters.description: When true, run the full validate-and-price path and return what would be placed WITHOUT submitting the wager. Defaults to false: a real bet is placed and your account is debited.

x-codeSamples.label: curl
x-codeSamples.source:
# dryRun=true — remove to place the bet for real
curl -u '{{PINC_USER}}:{{PINC_PASS}}' \
  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -d '{"sportId": 29, "eventId": 1620849621,
       "betType": "MONEYLINE", "team": "TEAM1",
       "lineId": 3251987654, "stake": 10}' \
  'https://api.pinc000.com/bets/straight?dryRun=true'

get.description:
The straight bets your account has placed.

Each entry carries the bet id, status, market coordinates, stake and price;
any additional fields reported for a bet are passed through unchanged.
Returns `503` if the list cannot be fetched at this moment — retry shortly.

The available sports: each one's numeric id (the `{sport}` value the
other endpoints take) and name, plus whether it currently has events on
offer and how many.

get.summary: Full market set for an event
get.description:
Every market offered for one event: all alternate handicap and total
lines, team totals, the corners and bookings markets, and the specials
(correct score, both teams to score, goalscorer, half-time/full-time, …).

Send an event id from `/sports/{sport}/events`. Market depth loads on
demand, so the first request for a new event may take a few seconds;
subsequent requests return immediately. `404` means the event is not
currently on offer — list its sport's events first.

post.summary: Quote the latest bindable price for a selection
post.description:
Quote the latest bindable price for one selection.

Send the selection's coordinates — market kind, side, line and line id —
exactly as they appear in `/sports/{sport}/odds` or
`/events/{event_id}/markets`. You get back the freshest price a bet can
currently be placed at (it can be ahead of the polled odds), together with
the stake limits and a status (`OK`, `ODDS_CHANGE`, or unavailable).
`404` means the event or the selection is not currently on offer.

BetType.title: BetType
BetType.description: The market kind of a straight bet.

BetsResponse.title: BetsResponse
BetsResponse.description: The straight bets your account has placed.

availableBalance.title: Availablebalance
availableBalance.description: The amount available to stake right now, in `currency` units.

outstandingTransactions.title: Outstandingtransactions
outstandingTransactions.description: The total amount currently tied up in unsettled bets.

givenCredit.title: Givencredit
givenCredit.description: Credit extended to the account, if any.

currency.title: Currency
currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code all amounts are denominated in, e.g. `"EUR"`.

ClientBalance.title: ClientBalance
ClientBalance.description:
Your betting account's balance. All amounts are in `currency` units;
fields the account does not report are omitted.

FillType.title: FillType
FillType.description: How to fill a bet whose available stake is below the request.

id.title: Id
id.description:
The event id — use it with `/events/{event_id}/markets`,
`/events/{event_id}/price` and `POST /bets/straight`.

liveStatus.title: Livestatus
liveStatus.description: 0 = no live betting, 1 = live event, 2 = live on another event.

Fixture.title: Fixture
Fixture.description: One event on offer: its id, start time, teams and live status.

last.title: Last
last.description:
Unix timestamp in **milliseconds** — the moment this data was current.
Pass it back as `?since=<last>` on the next call to receive only changes
after that moment; an empty response then means nothing changed (idle, not
an error).

league.title: League
league.description:
The leagues carrying events. Empty when polling with `?since=` and
nothing has changed.

FixturesResponse.title: FixturesResponse
FixturesResponse.description: Events on offer for one sport, grouped by league.

state.title: State
state.description: Match phase: 1 = 1st half, 2 = half time, 3 = 2nd half, 9 = ended.

InRunningEvent.title: InRunningEvent
InRunningEvent.description: Live game state for one event.

InRunningLeague.title: InRunningLeague
InRunningLeague.description: One league and its live events.

sports.title: Sports
sports.description: At most the requested sport; empty when it has no live events.

InRunningResponse.title: InRunningResponse
InRunningResponse.description: Live game state for the requested sport.

InRunningSport.title: InRunningSport
InRunningSport.description: One sport and its live leagues.

MoreBets.title: MoreBets
MoreBets.description:
The full market set for one requested event.

`goals` is the requested event; `corners`/`bookings` are its sibling
events (each with its own event id). Any of the three may be null when
that market group is not offered.

MoreBetsEvent.title: MoreBetsEvent
MoreBetsEvent.description:
One market group of an event's full market set (Goals, Corners or
Bookings), with every period's lines.

MoreBetsPeriod.title: MoreBetsPeriod
MoreBetsPeriod.description:
All of one child event's markets for a single period (0=match, 1=1st
half, 2=2nd half).

homeScore.title: Homescore
homeScore.description: Current home score; present only while the event is live.

awayScore.title: Awayscore
awayScore.description: Current away score; present only while the event is live.

OddsFormat.title: OddsFormat

OddsLeague.title: OddsLeague
OddsLeague.description: One league and its events' odds.

draw.title: Draw
draw.description: Present only when a draw price is offered (3-way markets).

lineId.title: Lineid
lineId.description:
Line id to send when quoting or placing a bet on this period's main
lines.

OddsPeriod.title: OddsPeriod
OddsPeriod.description: All lines for one betting period of an event.

last.title: Last
last.description:
Unix timestamp in **milliseconds** — the moment this data was current.
Pass it back as `?since=<last>` on the next call to receive only changes
after that moment; an empty response then means nothing changed (idle, not
an error).

leagues.title: Leagues
leagues.description:
The leagues carrying events. Empty when polling with `?since=` and
nothing has changed.

OddsResponse.title: OddsResponse
OddsResponse.description: Live odds for one sport, grouped league → event → period.

altLineId.title: Altlineid
altLineId.description: Line id of an alternate line; absent on the main line.

hdp.title: Hdp
hdp.description: Home handicap; the away side takes the negation.

OddsSpread.title: OddsSpread
OddsSpread.description: A handicap (spread) line: back `home` at `hdp` or `away` at `-hdp`.

altLineId.title: Altlineid
altLineId.description: Line id of an alternate line; absent on the main line.

placedAt.title: Placedat
placedAt.description: When the bet was placed, ISO-8601 UTC.

stake.title: Stake
stake.description: The staked amount, in your account currency.

price.title: Price
price.description: The odds the bet was filled at.

PlacedBet.title: PlacedBet
PlacedBet.description:
One placed bet. The common fields are typed below; any additional
fields reported for a bet are passed through unchanged, so nothing is
lost.

SelectionOdds.title: SelectionOdds
SelectionOdds.description:
The freshest bindable quote for one selection.

`odds` is the decimal price a bet can currently be placed at; `status` is
"OK" / "ODDS_CHANGE" / "UNAVAILABLE". `line_id` is the current price id
and `alt_line_id` the stable alternate-line id (0 for a main line);
`min_stake` / `max_stake` bound the wager. Any additional fields reported
for the quote are passed through unchanged, so nothing is lost.

Special.title: Special
Special.description:
A self-describing exotic market: correct score, both teams to score,
double chance, goalscorer, HT/FT, winning margin, odd/even, etc. Each one
carries its own name and the list of pickable outcomes.

SpecialSelection.title: SpecialSelection
SpecialSelection.description: One pickable outcome inside a `Special` market.

id.title: Id
id.description: The numeric sport id — the `{sport}` value in the other endpoints.

has_offerings.title: Has Offerings
has_offerings.description: Whether the sport currently has events on offer.

event_count.title: Event Count
event_count.description: The number of events currently on offer.

SportInfo.title: SportInfo
SportInfo.description:
One sport: the numeric id the `/sports/{sport}/...` paths take, its
name, and how many events it currently has on offer.

oddsFormat.description: Price format the response's `price` is expressed in.

uniqueRequestId.title: Uniquerequestid
uniqueRequestId.description: Idempotency key for this placement; a UUID is minted when absent.

acceptBetterLine.title: Acceptbetterline
acceptBetterLine.description: Accept the bet when the line has moved in your favour.

stake.title: Stake
stake.description:
Amount to bet, in your account currency. `winRiskStake` says whether
it is the amount to win or to risk.

winRiskStake.description: Whether `stake` is the amount to WIN or the amount to RISK.

altLineId.title: Altlineid
altLineId.description:
The alternate line's id (`altLineId` on the spread/total), when betting
an alternate line.

fillType.description: How to fill when the available stake is below the request.

team.description: The picked side for moneyline / spread / team total.

side.description: OVER or UNDER for totals / team totals.

handicap.title: Handicap
handicap.description: The spread handicap or the total's points, as shown in the odds.

StraightBetRequest.title: StraightBetRequest
StraightBetRequest.description:
A straight bet: one selection identified by its market coordinates
(`eventId` / `periodNumber` / `betType` + `team` / `side` / `handicap`)
plus the `lineId` (and `altLineId` for an alternate line) from
`/sports/{sport}/odds`, and the `stake`. The selection is re-priced at the
freshest bindable price before placement.

errorCode.title: Errorcode
errorCode.description: Why the bet was not placed, e.g. `LINE_UNAVAILABLE`.

uniqueRequestId.title: Uniquerequestid
uniqueRequestId.description: The idempotency key of this placement.

betId.title: Betid
betId.description: The placed bet's id; set on acceptance.

betStatus.title: Betstatus
betStatus.description:
e.g. `ACCEPTED`, `PENDING_ACCEPTANCE` — or `DRY_RUN` for a simulated
placement.

price.title: Price
price.description: The odds the bet was (or would be) filled at.

dryRun.title: Dryrun
dryRun.description:
True when the placement was simulated (`?dryRun=true`) — no wager was
submitted.

StraightBetResponse.title: StraightBetResponse
StraightBetResponse.description:
The placement result. `status` is `ACCEPTED` when the bet was placed
(then `betId` / `betStatus` identify it), `PROCESSED_WITH_ERROR` otherwise
(then `errorCode` explains); `price` echoes the filled odds.

TeamSide.title: TeamSide
TeamSide.description:
`team` for moneyline / spread / team-total picks. TEAM1 = home,
TEAM2 = away.

WinRiskType.title: WinRiskType
WinRiskType.description: Whether `stake` is the amount to win or the amount to risk.

tags.name: Markets
tags.description: Browse sports, their live events and odds — each response carries a `last` freshness timestamp (epoch ms) you pass back as `?since=` to poll for changes — plus the full market set for any single event.

tags.name: Betting
tags.description: Quote the latest bindable price for a selection, place straight bets and list the bets you placed. **`POST /bets/straight` places a real bet and debits your account unless you pass `?dryRun=true`.**

tags.name: Account
tags.description: Your account: the available balance and its currency.
